outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated intraday volatility expected. Negative 0DTE GEX (-0.20B) amplifies price swings. MONTHLY_1 positive GEX (0.92B) provides structural stability at key levels.
outlook.summary: Spot caught between 24700 RESONANCE magnet above and 24000 major support below. Bearish skew (1.31-1.52) across all expiries confirms institutional hedging. Max Pain convergence at 24700-24860 zone creates upward price attraction despite bearish sentiment.

WEEKLY_1 Max Pain + CALL OI 584 + MONTHLY_1 CALL OI 219 + 0DTE PUT OI 62. Triple expiry confluence at ATM level. Primary price target.

WEEKLY_1 gamma equilibrium. Transition zone where dealer hedging flips direction. Critical for volatility expansion.
0DTE Max Pain level 210 points above spot. Intraday price target aligned with dealer profit maximization.

Mixed OI zone: MONTHLY_1 CALL 1038 + PUT 555 + WEEKLY_1 PUT 112. Dealer delta hedging creates chop near this level.
